communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

A CPS directory listing school/unit, title, phone number and e-mail address for each CPS official, staff or employee with an email address. This request includes board members, subcommittee members, part-time employees, parent workers and any person issued a CPS email address.

This request is made on behalf of The FOIA Bakery. Because this request is in the public interest for Illinois nonprofit The FOIA Bakery’s work to advocate for public education, please waive any fees in accordance with 5 ILCS § 140/6(c). Feel free to contact me with any questions, or if clarification is needed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Miriam Bhimani

title: FOIA - Jay YAKELEY III US Navy Aviator TOPGUN

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Official Military Personnel File (OMPF) for JAY YAKELEY III
Request copy of history of assignments NAVPERS form 1070/605, Legion of Merit award citations, Meritorious Service medal citation, Navy Commendation medal citations, navy achievement medal citations, Air Medal award citations, all award citations, Cumulative Record of Training (NAVPERS Form 5300/16), Transfers and Receipts NAVPERS 601-12 from 1970 to 2000,  Administrative remarks NAVPERS 1070/613, all dates of promotions.
Please redact any personal information per Freedom of Information Act, U.S.C. § 552(b)(3) and U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).

VETERAN INFORMATION
Name of veteran: JAY  B. YAKELEY III
Branch of service: United States Navy
Rank: RADM
Service: 1968 to 2000

First Name - Jay
Last name - YAKELEY III

Passed away 8 March 2026.

Aviation Commands:
CO, VF-114
CO, VF-124
Navy Fighter Weapons School (TOPGUN)
Carrier Air Wing Fourteen
Commander Carrier Group THREE
Deputy Commander Joint Task Force Southwest Asia

7 Air Medals
Navy Commendation Medal with combat "V"
Defense Distinguished Service Medal with oak leaf cluster
Navy Distinguished Service Medal,
Legion of Merit with three gold stars,
Meritorious Service Medal

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

title: BOP Prison-Month Level Public Records Request

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: BOP Prison-Month Level Public Records Request
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I would like to request both that a document containing facility-month level data from January 2024 through December 2025 be provided on the below measures for every prison managed by the Bureau of Prisons: 

*Overall staff budgeted positions (per prison, per month)
*Overall staff filled positions (per prison, per month)
*Custody staff budgeted positions (per prison, per month)
*Custody staff filled positions (per prison, per month)
*Average hours of overall staff overtime (per prison, per month)
*Average hours of custody staff overtime (per prison, per month)
*Average hours of overall staff sick leave (per prison, per month)
*Average hours of custody staff sick leave (per prison, per month)
*Overall population count (per prison, per month)
*Total number of infractions (per prison, per month)
*Total number of violent infractions (including the department’s definition of which infractions are defined as violent) (per prison, per month)
*Total number in restricted housing (per prison, per month)
*Total number of grievances from incarcerated individuals (per prison, per month)

In order to help to determine my status to assess fees: I am affiliated with an educational institution (Colorado State University), and this request is made for a scholarly or scientific purpose and not for commercial use. Thank you for your consideration of this request.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jessie Harney
